Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, elevated chloride, high LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol. Renal function and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are normal. The lipid profile indicates increased cardiovascular risk. No evidence of significant renal impairment or diabetes. Recommend clinical correlation for hypoglycemia and consideration of lipid-lowering therapy.
